CreateSnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a snapshot

DeleteApp.description: Grants permission to delete an app

DeleteSimulation.description: Grants permission to delete a simulation

DescribeApp.description: Grants permission to describe an app

DescribeSimulation.description: Grants permission to describe a simulation

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags for a resource

StartApp.description: Grants permission to start an app

StartClock.description: Grants permission to start a simulation clock

StartSimulation.description: Grants permission to start a simulation

StopApp.description: Grants permission to stop an app

StopClock.description: Grants permission to stop a simulation clock

StopSimulation.description: Grants permission to stop a simulation

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by tag keys that are passed in the request
